properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are troubled on every side Yet not distressed, Perplexed but not in despair; Persecuted but not forsaken, Even in trials we are not forgotten. That’s why in all these things,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are more than conquerors Pressing the upward way; And we bear in our bodies The dying of our Lord everyday, everyday.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: ’Cause we are vessels of honour Set aside unto the Master’s use, And they whom He foreknew, Them He did choose. Our Lord was tempted on every side,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yet without sin, That we could reign with Him; Proven to be the true Saviour, Lord and King and Blessed Redeemer.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now we are given a sacred trust To fulfil His word In this hour of destruction. Surely goodness and mercy Will be with us despite the condition.
